description: Stage 1 of the Corthography Press pipeline for partners — start a template-query run via the corthography CLI and block until it reaches a terminal state. Wraps the corthography-press-query skill (which wraps the public CLI), so partners get the same authorization model as a direct CLI call. Run before template-render whenever fresh data is needed.

build.description: Start a template-query run for {asset} in the test environment and wait for it to reach a terminal state.

steps.name: Run template-query (test)
steps.description: Invoke the partner CLI to start a template-query run for {asset} against the test environment, blocking until the run is terminal. Surfaces the run_id, final status, and any CLI error verbatim.
steps.prompt: Use the corthography-press-query skill to start a template-query run for target {asset} with --env test --wait. After the run completes, report the run_id and final status. If the CLI exits non-zero, surface its error message verbatim — do not retry.

autonomy.description: Fully autonomous — query runs do not require approval. The wrapped CLI honors the partner's authorization scope; runs outside that scope fail fast at the API.
